content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach responds entirely at the content level throughout. There is no naming of how the client is showing up — no observation of the guilt-laden hedging ('I feel selfish even asking'), no read on the 'but' in turn 3, no notice of the flatness/resignation in 'Maybe. I don't know' in turn 9. The coach never uses observation language, never references somatic or energetic state, never distinguishes the said from the shown. The linguistic caveat ('am I being selfish?') that points to an inherited label is completely missed; instead the coach debates the verdict. Every coach turn is advice or reframe directed at the topic, not at the speaker's state.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Coach answers the surface question with a verdict and generic self-care reassurance. No read of the guilt, hedging, or the loaded frame of 'selfish'."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Coach takes the 'but' at face value as a logistics problem. Misses that the client is presenting a defense/justification pattern."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client offers 'I haven't brought it up' — a charged disclosure — and coach jumps to scripting advice without noticing the avoidance or what's underneath."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client names guilt directly; coach intellectualizes and reframes rather than reading the felt state or inviting the client into it."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client's 'Maybe. I don't know' is an obvious read opportunity (deflation, non-arrival). Coach pushes harder into encouragement, missing the signal entirely."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["linguistic-caveat", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "notes": "Coach also trips the spiritual-narcissism and jump-to-compassion anti-patterns, but those belong to other dimensions. On reads specifically: zero visible reads in the transcript."
}
